channel.title: +Satem-like on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Satem-like on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Armenian
item.description: “Book One is an alleged eyewitness account of the Armenian conversion to Christianity by one Zenob Klag. It is remarkable for its portrayal of this conversion as a colonial process, led and controlled by representatives of a new (foreign) religious movement. Albeit in collaboration with (a subjugated and obedient) section of the domestic nobility, this foreign Christian religion is only imposed aafter fierce battles against the (native) pagan leadership and its popular supporters.
